data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: _DSO_GC_AUTO_ZERO is exported as a process-level env var from clone_ticket_repo() in git-fixtures.sh. This may affect tests that source git-fixtures.sh in parallel processes or nested test scenarios where gc.auto is not pre-set to 0.
File: tests/lib/git-fixtures.sh
Category: maintainability
data.title: git-fixtures.sh: _DSO_GC_AUTO_ZERO export may leak between parallel test processes
